narrative:
Bennington Twp West (precinct in Morrow County) has 1,185 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
